hero.description: Discover a range of high-quality products designed with precision and care to deliver comfort, nurture your well-being, and give you the confidence you deserve in everyday life.

trustBatch._comment: Trust badges section used in app/components/TrustBatch.tsx
trustBatch.title: Everything you need, in one trusted place
trustBatch.description: From premium ingredients to fast delivery, Sai brings together the standards and care your skin deserves. All in one, seamless experience.

items.title: Premium Quality Ingredients
items.description: Every formula is crafted with carefully selected, high-grade ingredients chosen for purity, performance, and results you can see and feel every day.

items.title: Safe & Dermatologically Tested
items.description: Our products undergo rigorous dermatological testing to ensure they are gentle, effective, and suitable for confident daily use on all skin types.

items.title: Inspired by German Standards
items.description: Rooted in German precision and care, each product reflects a commitment to quality manufacturing, consistency, and excellence in every detail.

items.title: Fast Delivery
items.description: Order with confidence and receive your essentials quickly, with secure packaging and reliable shipping straight to your door.

products.title: Skincare crafted with care
products.description: Explore our collection of premium formulas, each designed to deliver comfort, confidence, and visible results.

items.name: Hydrating Face Cream
items.description: Rich, nourishing cream for daily moisture and soft, supple skin.

items.name: Nourishing Face Serum

items.name: Repair Serum
items.description: Advanced formula with barrier-strengthening peptides for resilient skin.

items.name: Radiance Serum

ourStory._comment: Our Story section used in app/components/OurStory.tsx
ourStory.title: Rooted in German care, built for everyday confidence
ourStory.description: Sai was founded on a simple belief. Everyone deserves access to high-quality skincare inspired by German standards of precision, safety, and care. From ingredient selection to final delivery, every step reflects our commitment to your well-being.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Find quick and helpful answers about Sai Brand, our products, shipping, and everything you need to know for a smooth and confident shopping experience.

items.question: What is Sai Brand?
items.answer: Sai Brand is a modern lifestyle and care brand focused on delivering high-quality products designed for comfort, care, and confidence in everyday use.

items.question: Are Sai products safe to use?
items.answer: Yes, all Sai products are carefully developed with skin-friendly and quality-focused ingredients to ensure safe everyday use.

items.question: Where are Sai products made?
items.answer: Sai products are developed following modern quality standards with a focus on premium formulation and consistency.

items.question: Do you offer international shipping?
items.answer: Yes, Sai Brand supports shipping to multiple locations depending on availability and logistics coverage.

items.question: Can I return a product if I'm not satisfied?
items.answer: We aim for customer satisfaction. Return and refund policies depend on the product and order conditions.

items.question: Are Sai products suitable for all skin types?
items.answer: Yes, Sai products are designed to be gentle and suitable for a wide range of skin types.

cta.title: Experience the difference Sai makes in your everyday care.
cta.description: Discover premium-quality products designed to bring comfort, care, and confidence into your daily routine. Start your journey with Sai today.

footer.description: Premium-quality products designed for comfort, care, and confidence in your everyday life.
footer.trustLine: Secure payments • Fast shipping • Trusted quality
footer.tagline: Crafted with care for your everyday confidence.
